Footer.disclaimer: Companion support only. Not medical, legal, or emergency services. No claim of 24/7 protection or guaranteed safety. By using Korea SafeMate you acknowledge these limits.
Footer.disclaimerShort: Companion support only — not medical, legal, or emergency services. No guaranteed 24/7 coverage.

Brand.tagline: Local intelligence · Guardian community · Safe support
Brand.description: Practical local information, a contributor Guardian community with clear tiers, and ops-gated matching for on-the-ground support — not generic tourism marketing or a forum free-for-all.

Home.metaDescription: Trustworthy local intelligence and calm, scoped support from Korea SafeMate — regions, Guardians, and booking.
Home.heroTitle: Real locals, curated intel — before and during your Korea trip.
Home.heroLead: {brand} brings together moderated regional guides and Guardians you can book for arrivals, K-culture routes, and first-day friction. For visitors and domestic explorers — not anonymous forum noise or scripted tour packages.
Home.processClarity: Requests are reviewed before any Guardian or external chat is introduced. MVP: expect initial email follow-up within about 1–2 business days.
Home.trustBandLead: We are upfront about what we deliver — and what we never promise. Read the boundaries before you book.
Home.discoverSectionTitle: Explore Korea with signal, not brochure clutter
Home.discoverSectionLead: Region-scoped posts from contributors and Guardians — read the mechanics, then request matched support when you want a person next to the plan.
Home.servicesSectionLead: Arrival, K-route execution, and first-day help — fixed scope, clear limits, human coordination.
Home.howItWorksLead: Three related pieces — not one vague “trust” badge.
Home.scopeNote: Not emergency response, medical, or legal advice. Scope and exclusions are shown before you book.
Home.layersLead: Open participation for intel; separate verification for matching; external chat handoff in the MVP — clarity over hype.
Home.layer1Body: Region-scoped tips, hot places, and practical arrival mechanics — vivid and specific, moderated for quality.
Home.layer2Body: Open contribution with tier rules; activity and mutual reviews build trust signals separate from matching eligibility.
Home.layer3Body: Verified Guardians only after review + policy checks; early coordination uses external chat handoff — no full in-app chat MVP.
Home.sessionsLead: Arrival, K-route execution, and first-day adaptation — scoped companion help, not licensed tour commentary.
Home.ctaLead: Tell us your arrival window and needs. Our team reviews every request and matches a Guardian when availability aligns.

Services.metaDescription: Arrival, K-Route, and First 24 Hours companion support in Seoul.
Services.title: Companion services
Services.intro: Fixed-scope support sessions. Pricing shown is indicative for MVP planning — final quotes may vary by distance and timing.

arrival.title: Arrival Companion
arrival.shortDescription: From airport or station to your accommodation — transit basics and check-in support.
bullets: Airport or major station to your stay
T-money / SIM basics and first navigation
Check-in support and simple local setup

k_route.title: K-Route Companion
k_route.shortDescription: Execution support for K-content related places you choose — not professional tour guiding.
bullets: Visit K-content related spots you already chose
Route execution: tickets, queues, ordering, directions
Practical help — not scripted tourism commentary

first_24h.title: First 24 Hours
first_24h.shortDescription: First-day adaptation: transit, apps, food ordering, and settling in with realistic scope.

Explore.metaDescription: Region-based local intelligence — moderated, practical, Guardian-grounded.
Explore.heroTitle: Real local intelligence — before you book
Explore.heroDescription: Explore is curated for decisions: hot places, food queues, K-content execution, shopping mechanics, and practical arrival tips. Most insights come from Guardians with visible tiers and contribution history — not generic blog posts or open forums.
Explore.heroNote: We gather practical information for both Korean and international readers. The aim is Guardian-reviewed clarity — not machine translation.
Explore.regionSectionLead: Phase 1 metros first — structure ready for Phase 2 destinations.
Explore.featuredLead: Trusted locals and seed partners — highlighted for quality, not pay-to-play ads.
Explore.ctaLead: Browse intel first — then book scoped support or start contributing as a Guardian.
Explore.regionHubTagsLead: Filter posts below — same categories as the national Explore view.
Explore.moderationPreviewLead: Shown for ops alignment — travelers normally see approved posts only.
Explore.regionGuardiansLead: Active and verified tiers reflect contribution and separate verification — not hype.

Book.metaDescription: Request trusted local support — reviewed before matching.
Book.title: Request trusted local support
Book.intro: This is a calm, structured intake — not a one-click tour checkout. Share accurate context so we can match you thoughtfully. External chat is only introduced after our team approves scope and a Guardian fit.

TrustScope.title: Service scope & boundaries
TrustScope.lead: Korea SafeMate provides practical companion support. We are not a licensed tour operator, medical provider, legal advisor, or emergency service. We do not guarantee outcomes or "full responsibility" for your safety.
included: Curated local intel and moderated posts by region
Guardian reputation from contribution + mutual reviews
Practical companion sessions with clear scope (arrival, routes, first hours)
External chat handoff (Telegram, KakaoTalk, WhatsApp, etc.) once matched
excluded: Generic brochure marketing or unmoderated forum chaos
Automatic matching privileges from post volume alone
Medical, legal, or emergency response claims
First-party real-time chat platform (MVP uses external channels)

BookingSuccess.title: Request submitted
BookingSuccess.body: Thank you. Our team will review your context and availability. You are not connected to a Guardian or external chat yet — we will email you at {email} with next steps when matching is ready.
BookingSuccess.bodyNoEmail: Thank you. Our team will review your context and availability. You are not connected to a Guardian or external chat yet — we will contact you with next steps when matching is ready.
BookingSuccess.mvpNote: (MVP: not saved to database — configure Supabase for persistence.)
BookingSuccess.summaryUnavailableBody: Open this page from the same browser session right after submitting, or keep your reference ID for support.
BookingSuccess.summaryUnavailableHint: If you refreshed or opened in another device, details are not stored client-side.

Login.title: Log in
Login.description: Authentication is not wired in this MVP build. Use public pages and role dashboards for UI preview only.

GuardiansPage.metaDescription: Tiers, reputation, and featured locals — open participation ≠ trusted matching.
